title: icacina oliviformis var. pubescens
intro: Icacina oliviformis var. pubescens is a variety of the Icacina oliviformis plant, belonging to the family Icacinaceae, which is a tropical plant native to West and Central Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Icacina oliviformis var. pubescens include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in traditional medicine to aid digestion and relieve menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and roots in water or using them in the form of decoctions to extract its medicinal properties.
